name: Burt Reynolds
abstract: Burton Leon Reynolds Jr. (February 11, 1936 – September 6, 2018) was an American actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: right now I’m doing some movies with Burt Reynolds, three movies
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Horn Shirley
about_quotes.evidence: one night I was romancing with Burt Reynolds, and all these people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Horn Shirley — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Oliver Nelson Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: he did a movie called “Skullduggery” with a young Burt Reynolds.
about_quotes.doc_title: Oliver Nelson Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 10, 2020
